title: I am a fucking killer — death-not-feared, life-engulfed (Jan 22, 2026)
html:
I am a fucking killer — death-not-feared, life-engulfed

Source: 2026-01-22 Apple Note (titled with the date "1/21/2026"). One paragraph, first-person declarative. Written 9 days after the Rankett.com strategy junk drawer and during the active GTM-bible execution period.

TL;DR

  • "I am a fucking killer. intense fire is behind my eyes and I will devour. The only way to crack me is to kill me. Death is not feared, life is engulfed." — the entire note.
  • A first-person declarative manifesto in the fall backwards into void vein — same vocabulary lineage (intense fire, death, engulf), one month earlier, even more compressed.
  • "Death is not feared, life is engulfed" is a legacy question-adjacent line: the death-check resolves so quickly it inverts — life consumed, not death dreaded.
  • Sits in the November 2025 → April 2026 manifesto sequence: Nov 20 leader amongst men → Dec 2 ferociously obsessed → this → Feb 26 four paragraph void → Apr 14 god's eyes. Five-note polish arc.
  • The "intense fire behind my eyes" image is Yahir's clearest reuse of his own soul as beacon vocabulary in the Austin period.

Key quote

"The only way to crack me is to kill me. Death is not feared, life is engulfed."

Pattern observed

The progression from the interrogative form (Dec 2 "are you ferociously obsessed?") to the declarative form here (50 days later) is the cleanest demonstration of the manifesto style note evolution — the question gets answered in the affirmative, then the answer becomes the new identity claim.

The "killer" framing is also a softer cousin of violence as only effective tool — same metaphor cluster (battle, devour, crack, kill) reused as identity scaffolding rather than as a worldview claim. Yahir is borrowing the warrior register to load his own commitment, not to recommend violence.

Open questions

  • Trigger — a specific Rankett milestone? A David Goggins / Iceman podcast? A pre-pitch hype-up?
  • Is the title "1/21/2026" deliberately the previous day, or is the note actually from late Jan 21 with create-time spilling into Jan 22 timezone?
  • Does the "life is engulfed" phrasing recur elsewhere — Yahir-coined or quoted?
